entity: Stephen Curry 2015-16 season (GSW, Regular): 79 GP, 30.1 PPG, 5.4 RPG, 6.7 APG, 402 three-pointers made — unanimous MVP, the most 3PM in a single season in NBA history, 73-9 Warriors

query_target.sql: SELECT season_year, season_type, CAST(gp AS INTEGER) AS gp, avg_pts, avg_reb, avg_ast FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 201939 AND season_year = '2015-16' AND season_type = 'Regular' LIMIT 1

notes: Historic completed season; match:containsObject with exact values. Re-pinned 2026-07 after the curated-layer rebuild: BBR says 79 GP / 30.1 PPG (2375 pts, 430 reb, 527 ast); the pre-rebuild table claimed 82 GP / 29.0 PPG. The 402 three-pointers are a separate stat (total_fg3m) not pinned here.
